3068380.name: Carnival Of Souls
3068380.description: Step right up to Carnival of Souls, a heart-pounding first-person, rogue lite, shooter set in a twisted carnival world filled with strange dimensions. Navigate vibrant landscapes connected by mysterious portals and face relentless waves of enemies. With an arsenal of powerful weapons and upgrades at your disposal, your success depends on quick thinking and skill. How long can you survive the Carnival of Souls?
3068380.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
